objective: Maximize legitimate discoverability, verified external citations/references and meaningful LLM/search surfacing toward the portfolio 100K objective.
truth_boundary: Target is not guaranteed and is not a page quota.
risk_policy: Maximum discovery breadth does not relax financial, credit, legal, privacy, source or claim controls. Higher-risk opportunities may remain planning-only or approval-required.
required_strategies: source-backed reference assets, checklists, frameworks and decision aids
storage_policy: compressed sharded planning corpus; repo byte size is not fanout KPI
